name: Technetium Tc-99m red blood cells
description: Technetium Tc-99m red blood cells is a radiopharmaceutical diagnostic agent that is intravenously administered to be used in blood pool imaging, including cardiac first pass and gated equilibrium imaging and for detection of sites of gastrointestinal bleeding. The red blood cells are radiolabeled after the pertechnetate Tc 99m diffuses across the red blood cell membrane.
